## Safety impact

Does this bug affect any of the following? (Check all that apply)

- [ ] cLaw enforcement or integrity verification
- [ ] Trust engine or consent gates
- [ ] Memory or personality corruption
- [ ] Data being sent somewhere unexpected
- [ ] None of the above

> **If you checked any safety box above**, please also email stephen@futurespeak.ai with details. Safety-related bugs receive priority handling.
